body:
Tomoko, thanks for sending over those notes from the [Breakthrough Energy Ventures](orgs/breakthrough-energy-ventures) panel — really useful framing on the grid infrastructure bottlenecks, and it tracks closely with what we've been hearing from a few of our portfolio companies on the demand side. I've been thinking a lot about the compute-meets-clean-power thesis lately, and it sounds like we're circling similar territory from different angles. Would love to find 30 minutes sometime in the next couple of weeks to compare notes more directly, especially as we head into what feels like a particularly active deal season for this intersection. I think there's real potential for us to be useful to each other when co-investment situations come up — we've been pretty active at seed and Series A, so our entry points might complement where Khosla typically leans in. Let me know what your schedule looks like and I'll send over some times.

Amara
